name: Case A — Good Fit Fresh CV
summary: Power Platform and M365 automation practitioner who turns HR, legal, and operational workflows into governed low-code solutions, adoption dashboards, and supportable handoffs. Grounded experience spans Power Apps, Power Automate, SharePoint-backed routing, Power BI visibility, documentation, and production troubleshooting for business users.
content:
# Li Ting Kao / Christine Kao

Li Ting Kao / Christine Kao
Target: Power Platform Developer
Taipei

## Summary

Power Platform and M365 automation practitioner who turns HR, legal, and operational workflows into governed low-code solutions, adoption dashboards, and supportable handoffs. Grounded experience spans Power Apps, Power Automate, SharePoint-backed routing, Power BI visibility, documentation, and production troubleshooting for business users.

## Skills

Power Platform / M365: Power Apps, Power Automate, SharePoint Lists, Power BI, Microsoft 365 Copilot, Workflow automation, Governance documentation, Production troubleshooting, Stakeholder handoff

## Work Experience

Business Process Engineer / IS BA | Trend Micro | 2021 - 2026
Section: Power Platform Workflow Delivery
- Built a Power Apps and SharePoint-backed DPIA / AI impact assessment workflow with automated routing, reviewer controls, and governance-ready process visibility.
- Created a self-service mentor booking workflow using form intake and SharePoint lists so HR program users could manage requests without manual spreadsheet tracking.
- Supported production HR automation flows after handover, connecting Power Automate, Workday RaaS API, Dataverse, SharePoint, Jenkins, and Power BI operating signals.
Section: Support, Documentation, and Adoption Analytics
- Authored low-code automation and API engagement documentation covering roles, connection ownership, environment handoff, and maintainability expectations.
- Stabilized recruiting sync flows by resolving data and flow defects across Power Automate, Workday RaaS API, and SharePoint handoff paths.
- Built M365 Copilot usage and adoption dashboard views from audit, license, and distribution-list data to give stakeholders clearer adoption visibility.
- Managed M365 Copilot trial conversion operations using usage reporting, vendor coordination, and license follow-up.

Data Engineer & Tableau Dashboard Development Sales Specialist | Advanced Communication Technology & Solutions Corporation | 2016 - 2020
Section: Data and Dashboard Foundation
- Delivered dashboard and data-support work that built the analytics foundation later reused in HR and workflow visibility projects.
- Coordinated technical solution support and project documentation for client delivery teams, strengthening business-to-technology handoff habits.

## Education

AI/Big Data Analysis | TibaMe | 2020/02 - 2020/08

Master of Biomedical Sciences | Chang Gung University | 2009/07 - 2011/08

## Languages

Chinese | Native
English | Professional

recommendedPositioning.summaryAngle: Power Platform developer with grounded Power Apps, Power Automate, SharePoint, governance documentation, production troubleshooting, and M365 adoption analytics evidence.
wordingGuidance: Power Platform / M365 automation practitioner focused on workflow delivery, governance documentation, and production support.
Strengthen wording only when supported by selected evidence.
Preserve unsupported requirements as gaps or risks, not visible strengths.

remainingHiringRisks.impactOnInterviewProbability: May reduce interview probability unless the CV keeps wording conservative.
remainingHiringRisks.mitigation: Evidence does not support independent Azure cloud architecture ownership.

remainingHiringRisks.risk: How much code versus configuration did you personally own?
remainingHiringRisks.impactOnInterviewProbability: May reduce interview probability if the recruiter or hiring manager requires direct proof.
remainingHiringRisks.mitigation: Prepare truthful interview evidence or choose a more adjacent target angle.

keywordPlacementNotes: Power Apps, Power Automate, SharePoint, workflow automation, and support documentation are placed in visible CV sections because Screening Analysis marks them as supported.

interviewNotes.details: Do not claim independent Azure cloud architecture ownership; discuss only tools touched inside automation contexts.
